case_title: SALVADOR DELGADILLO VS. FERNANDO GOMEZ et al

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF DELGADILLO, SALVADOR AS TO DEFENDANT GOMEZ, FERNANDO GOMEZ, RAFAEL GOMEZ, ANA ROSA HERTZ VEHICLES, LLC DOES 1 TO 25 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR NOV-06-2009 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  AUG-10-2009 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         OCT-22-2009
ADDED TO PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CALENDAR HEARING SET FOR SEP-15-2009 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 212
MINI-MINUTES FOR SEP-15-2009 9:00 AM FOR DEPT 212
AFTER HEARING, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS ORDERED OFF CALENDAR. (212) ARLENE HOWELL, CSR#2542. (212)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR DEC-21-2009 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE NOV-06-2009 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
MINI-MINUTES FOR DEC-21-2009 1:30 PM FOR DEPT 212

SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $350.00 AGAINST GREGORY C. CATTERMOLE, ESQ., FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: DEC-21-2009, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE JAN-05-2010. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR DEC-21-2009 CONTINUED TO FEB-22-2010 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 212 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
SANCTION PAYMENT DEPOSITED BY PLAINTIFF DELGADILLO, SALVADOR
MINI-MINUTES FOR FEB-22-2010 1:30 PM FOR DEPT 212

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR FEB-22-2010 CONTINUED TO MAY-24-2010 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 212 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) OR FILE PROOF OF SERVICE OF ORDER GRANTING MOTION TO WITHDRAW. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF MAY-24-2010 IS OFF CALENDAR DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
